name: agentsec
description: AI-powered security scanning agent that orchestrates multiple security tools in parallel and performs LLM-based semantic code review.

commands.title: AgentSec: Scan Workspace for Security Issues
AgentSec: Scan Folder for Security Issues
AgentSec: Scan File for Security Issues

chatParticipants.name: agentsec
chatParticipants.description: Scan code for security vulnerabilities using multiple tools in parallel

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Run a full parallel security scan on the workspace

commands.name: supply-chain
commands.description: Scan dependencies for supply chain attacks

commands.name: tools
commands.description: Show available and missing security scanner tools

agentsec.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter with agentsec-core installed.

agentsec.model.description: Global LLM model for all scan phases. Per-phase overrides (modelScanners, modelAnalysis, modelSynthesis) take priority when set.

agentsec.modelScanners.description: LLM model for Phase 2 (parallel scanner sub-agents). Leave empty to use the global model.

agentsec.modelAnalysis.description: LLM model for Phase 3 (LLM deep analysis / semantic code review). Leave empty to use the global model.

agentsec.modelSynthesis.description: LLM model for Phase 4 (report synthesis). Leave empty to use the global model.

agentsec.maxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of parallel scanner sessions.

agentsec.enableLlmAnalysis.description: Enable LLM deep analysis phase (semantic code review).

agentsec.scanTimeout.description: Safety timeout for scans in seconds.

enumDescriptions: Run scanners in parallel using sub-agent sessions (recommended)
Run scanners sequentially in a single session

agentsec.promptScannerSelection.description: Show a scanner selection picker before each scan. When enabled, a QuickPick dialog lets you choose which installed scanners to run.

agentsec.systemMessage.description: Override the AI system message (instructions). Leave empty to use the built-in default.

agentsec.systemMessageFile.description: Path to a file containing the system message. Overrides systemMessage when set.

agentsec.initialPrompt.description: Override the initial scan prompt template. Use {folder_path} as placeholder. Leave empty for default.

agentsec.initialPromptFile.description: Path to a file containing the initial prompt template. Overrides initialPrompt when set.

agentsec.configFile.description: Path to a YAML config file (agentsec.yaml). Leave empty for automatic search.

agentsec.skipScanners.description: List of scanner names to always exclude (e.g. graudit-security-scan). All other relevant scanners will still run.

agentsec.verbose.description: Enable verbose/debug logging in the AgentSec output channel.
